title: Skill grant policy
description: Per-role / per-tenant skill access control configuration. The runtime applies this BEFORE the trigger matcher runs.

roles.description: Map of role name to grant rules.

allow_all.description: If true, every skill is allowed for this role (subject to denylist). Useful for admin / debug roles.

allowed.description: Explicit allowlist of skill ids. Ignored when allow_all is true.

denied.description: Explicit denylist. Takes precedence over allowed and allow_all.

tenants.description: Optional per-tenant overrides. Same shape as roles, keyed by tenant id.

log_decisions.description: Record every allows() decision (allow + deny) to the trace.

log_denials_to_console.description: Also surface denials to stderr (useful in dev to catch misconfigured grants).
